payload.label: outlet
payload.long_description: White plastic rectangular wall outlet faceplate, vertical orientation, right edge partially cropped; two faint circular socket openings visible and surface shows light smudges or pale green marks, image is low-resolution and slightly blurred — estimated ~0.5 m from camera.
